---
title: "Accessing the SeNorge Snow dataset"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Accessing the SeNorge2 Snow dataset}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
  chunk_output_type: console
---

**Author**: Moritz Shore (moritz.shore@nibio.no)

**Date**: May, 2026

## Introduction

WIP
